sentences.arabic: التَّطَوُّرُ التِّقْنِيُّ فِي الْعَالَمِ الْعَرَبِيِّ سَرِيعٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Tehnološki razvoj u arapskom svijetu je veoma brz.
sentences.translationEn: Technological development in the Arab world is very fast.

sentences.arabic: تَبْنِي بَعْضُ الدُّوَلِ مُدُنًا ذَكِيَّةً تَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى الطَّاقَةِ النَّظِيفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Neke zemlje grade pametne gradove koji se oslanjaju na čistu energiju.
sentences.translationEn: Some countries are building smart cities that rely on clean energy.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الشَّبَابُ الْعَرَبُ التِّكْنُولُوجِيَا لِلِابْتِكَارِ وَالْإِبْدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska omladina koristi tehnologiju za inovacije i kreativnost.
sentences.translationEn: Arab youth use technology for innovation and creativity.
